requirement_topic.en: KEBS PVoC Import Conformity for Solar PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: 太阳能光伏逆变器的 KEBS PVoC 进口合格评定
requirement_topic.zht: 太陽能光伏逆變器的 KEBS PVoC 進口合格評定

summary.en: KEBS operates the Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme for goods destined to Kenya. The official KEBS page states that PVoC assesses products in the exporting country against applicable Kenyan technical regulations, mandatory standards, or approved specifications; China is listed in the PVoC contractor zone. For a solar PV inverter shipment, the importer and exporter should plan for a Certificate of Conformity or applicable exemption before Kenyan port clearance.
summary.zh: KEBS 对运往肯尼亚的货物实施 Pre-Export Verification of Conformity（PVoC）计划。KEBS 官方页面说明，PVoC 在出口国对产品是否符合适用的肯尼亚技术法规、强制标准或认可规范进行评定；中国列入 PVoC 承包商责任区域。太阳能光伏逆变器出货时，进口商和出口商应在肯尼亚港口清关前安排合格证书或适用豁免。
summary.zht: KEBS 對運往肯亞的貨物實施 Pre-Export Verification of Conformity（PVoC）計畫。KEBS 官方頁面說明，PVoC 在出口國對產品是否符合適用的肯亞技術法規、強制標準或認可規範進行評定；中國列入 PVoC 承包商責任區域。太陽能光伏逆變器出貨時，進口商和出口商應在肯亞港口清關前安排合格證書或適用豁免。

standards_or_laws: KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity to Standards (PVoC)
The Verification of Conformity to Kenya Standards of Imports (Amendment) Order, 2020 (Legal Notice No. 78 of 2020)
Applicable Kenya Standards or approved specifications for the declared inverter model

summary.en: China-origin factory reports, CQC or CGC certificates, CE files, and IEC/CB reports may support the PVoC review, but they are not themselves the Kenya PVoC Certificate of Conformity. The PVoC agent still reviews the shipment, model documents, standards mapping, and inspection route for Kenya.
summary.zh: 中国来源的工厂报告、CQC 或 CGC 证书、CE 文件以及 IEC/CB 报告可支持 PVoC 审查，但其本身不是肯尼亚 PVoC 合格证书。PVoC 代理仍需针对肯尼亚审查该批货物、型号文件、标准映射及检验路径。
summary.zht: 中國來源的工廠報告、CQC 或 CGC 證書、CE 文件以及 IEC/CB 報告可支持 PVoC 審查，但其本身不是肯亞 PVoC 合格證書。PVoC 代理仍需針對肯亞審查該批貨物、型號文件、標準映射及檢驗路徑。

standards_or_laws: Voluntary CQC or CGC PV inverter certification evidence where available

gap.en: The export-file gap is route control: Kenya requires the PVoC import conformity route unless a valid exemption applies. Prepare the IDF, invoice, packing list, HS code, model list, nameplate ratings, test reports, user manual, and Kenyan standard or approved-specification mapping before shipment.
gap.zh: 出口文件差距在于路径控制：除非适用有效豁免，肯尼亚要求走 PVoC 进口合格评定路径。出货前应准备 IDF、发票、装箱单、HS 编码、型号清单、铭牌参数、测试报告、用户手册以及肯尼亚标准或认可规范映射。
gap.zht: 出口文件差距在於路徑控制：除非適用有效豁免，肯亞要求走 PVoC 進口合格評定路徑。出貨前應準備 IDF、發票、裝箱單、HS 編碼、型號清單、銘牌參數、測試報告、使用者手冊以及肯亞標準或認可規範映射。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for imported goods subject to Kenya PVoC unless a KEBS-recognised exemption or waiver applies
mandatory_status.cn: Not an outbound China certification requirement; China documents may support Kenya PVoC but do not replace it

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Kenya PVoC as the import gate for China-origin solar PV inverters unless KEBS confirms an exemption. A China certificate package should be prepared as supporting evidence, not as a substitute for the Kenyan CoC route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非 KEBS 确认豁免，应将肯尼亚 PVoC 视为中国来源太阳能光伏逆变器的进口关口。中国证书包应作为支持证据准备，而不是替代肯尼亚 CoC 路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非 KEBS 確認豁免，應將肯亞 PVoC 視為中國來源太陽能光伏逆變器的進口關口。中國證書包應作為支持證據準備，而不是替代肯亞 CoC 路徑。

requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109 Safety Evidence for PV Inverter PVoC Files
requirement_topic.zh: PVoC 文件中的 IEC 62109 光伏逆变器安全证据
requirement_topic.zht: PVoC 文件中的 IEC 62109 光伏逆變器安全證據

summary.en: KEBS says PVoC certification is based on Kenya standards or approved specifications. For PV inverters, import conformity files commonly need model-specific safety evidence aligned to IEC 62109-1 for general converter safety and IEC 62109-2 for inverter-specific requirements, or to any Kenya adoption or approved specification required by the PVoC contractor. The mandatory act is the Kenya import conformity decision; IEC 62109 evidence is the technical basis when requested or mapped by the applicable standard route.
summary.zh: KEBS 说明 PVoC 认证以肯尼亚标准或认可规范为依据。对于光伏逆变器，进口合格评定文件通常需要按 IEC 62109-1 通用变换器安全和 IEC 62109-2 逆变器特殊要求，或按 PVoC 承包商要求的肯尼亚采标/认可规范，提供型号级安全证据。强制环节是肯尼亚进口合格评定决定；IEC 62109 证据是在适用标准路径要求或映射时使用的技术基础。
summary.zht: KEBS 說明 PVoC 認證以肯亞標準或認可規範為依據。對於光伏逆變器，進口合格評定文件通常需要按 IEC 62109-1 通用變換器安全和 IEC 62109-2 逆變器特殊要求，或按 PVoC 承包商要求的肯亞採標／認可規範，提供型號級安全證據。強制環節是肯亞進口合格評定決定；IEC 62109 證據是在適用標準路徑要求或映射時使用的技術基礎。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 - Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems - General requirements
IEC 62109-2 - Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems - Particular requirements for inverters
Applicable Kenya Standard adoption or approved specification used by the PVoC contractor

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter files often include GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, GB/T 19964-2024, and voluntary certification reports. These can be cross-referenced to IEC safety and grid topics, but the PVoC agent may require IEC/CB reports, Kenya-adopted standards, or retesting if the Chinese report does not match the declared Kenya route.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器文件通常包括 GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、GB/T 19964-2024 及自愿认证报告。这些文件可与 IEC 安全和并网主题交叉引用，但如果中国报告不匹配肯尼亚申报路径，PVoC 代理可能要求 IEC/CB 报告、肯尼亚采标文件或重新测试。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器文件通常包括 GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、GB/T 19964-2024 及自願認證報告。這些文件可與 IEC 安全和併網主題交叉引用，但如果中國報告不匹配肯亞申報路徑，PVoC 代理可能要求 IEC/CB 報告、肯亞採標文件或重新測試。

gap.en: The standards gap is traceability. Match the exact inverter model, firmware, ratings, protective functions, labels, and manuals to the IEC 62109 or Kenya-approved specification used in the PVoC file; do not rely on a generic China grid report alone.
gap.zh: 标准差距在于可追溯性。应将确切逆变器型号、固件、额定参数、保护功能、标签和说明书对应到 PVoC 文件所用的 IEC 62109 或肯尼亚认可规范；不要仅依赖通用中国并网报告。
gap.zht: 標準差距在於可追溯性。應將確切逆變器型號、韌體、額定參數、保護功能、標籤和說明書對應到 PVoC 文件所用的 IEC 62109 或肯亞認可規範；不要僅依賴通用中國併網報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only through the applicable Kenya PVoC, Kenya Standard, approved-specification, customer, or project route; IEC 62109 itself should be confirmed for the declared model and shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Usually voluntary or project/customer evidence for export unless tied to a Chinese domestic certification or procurement requirement

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 evidence as a likely safety backbone for the PVoC file, but confirm the exact Kenya standard or approved specification with the appointed PVoC contractor before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 可将 IEC 62109-1 和 IEC 62109-2 证据作为 PVoC 文件的常见安全主线，但出货前应向指定 PVoC 承包商确认确切肯尼亚标准或认可规范。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 可將 IEC 62109-1 和 IEC 62109-2 證據作為 PVoC 文件的常見安全主線，但出貨前應向指定 PVoC 承包商確認確切肯亞標準或認可規範。
